path: Sources PIK/PIK-5-Extended-Core-Kit/Phase 03 - Embark (Launch)/PIK 5-0 - User Behaviour - ENG.pdf
text: What is neccessary to effectively implement, monitor and maintain the desired behaviour? How can you prevent bad behaviour? Which behaviour of the stakeholder you want to promote? What is positive or according to your rules & normes? How can you promote / incentivise good behaviour?GOVERNANCE ACTIVITIESRULES & NORMS USER BEHAVIOUR 5.0 Part of the Platform Innovation Kit - the toolset for the platform generation Download at www.platforminnovationkit.com Created by fastbreak.one TITLEBEHAVIOUR ENG What are required rules & normes of your platform for the main process steps? (e.g. for registration, upload-filter, interaction, payment ...)STAKEHOLDER BEHAVIOUR MATCHONBOARDING TRANSACT / INTERACT ENGAGE PENALIZEPROMOTE FRICTION / HURDLES What are the biggest hurdles for the stakeholder while using your platform? What is causing friction for the stakeholder? Where in the journey is the user utilizing other services and ”leaves” the platform? STAKEHOLDER ALTERNATIVES What are the current alternatives to your journey and what do they better? Which behaviour of the stakeholder you want to panalize? What is the negative impact to your business and how would your prioritise the behaviour? PIK
